productDisplayName: Levis Kids Boy's Calcio Grey Blue Kidswear
description: CompositionBlue and grey check shirt made of 100% cotton, with pockets on either sides of the chest, stitch detailing on the front and embroidered brand mark above the left pocketFittingRegular47 cmWash care    Machine wash separately in cold water, colour will bleed    Use mild detergent    Dry cleaning possible    Do not bleach    Avoid soaking    Remove promptly    Dry flat inside out in shade    Iron at medium setting only    Iron on reverse    Wash before wearingDesigned for the little man growing up, this checked shirt from Levi's kidswear has the two pockets with an  embroidered brand mark on the chest to help him stash away his essentials and collectibles. The soft fabric will keep him all cool and comfortable while he is busy with playing around. Team this with denims and small sneakers for that complete grown up look.
